_comment: Default global templates shipped with oMLX. Seeded into <base_path>/global_templates.json on first run only — see omlx/model_settings.py:_load_templates. Edit this file to change the ship defaults; user-owned instances on disk are never overwritten. Values come from the Qwen3.6 sampling recipe; 131072 (128K) is the recommended context-window floor to preserve thinking capabilities.

templates.name: qwen36-thinking-general
templates.description: Qwen3.6 thinking-mode defaults for general tasks. 128K context window preserves thinking quality at the recommended floor.

templates.name: qwen36-thinking-coding
templates.description: Qwen3.6 thinking-mode defaults tuned for WebDev and other tasks that need lower variance.

templates.name: qwen36-instruct-general
templates.description: Qwen3.6 non-thinking defaults for general dialogue and short instruction-following.

templates.name: qwen36-instruct-reasoning
templates.description: Qwen3.6 non-thinking defaults bumped for harder reasoning prompts without enabling the thinking trace.
